classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

autocomplete.description: Should the browser support autocomplete for this field?

autofocus.description: Use an HTML autofocus attribute to instruct the browser to focus this widget.

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

flags.description: The name or names of the flags (e.g., 'progressive' or 'primary') to apply.

icon.description: The symbolic name of the icon (e.g., 'remove' or 'menu'), or a map of symbolic names.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

indicator.description: Symbolic name of the indicator (e.g. 'required' or 'down').

inputFilter.description: The name of an input filter function. Input filters modify the value of an input before it is accepted

inputId.description: The value of the input's HTML id attribute.

invisibleLabel.description: Whether the label should be visually hidden (but still accessible to screen-readers).

labelPosition.description: The position of the inline label relative to that of the value or placeholder text: 'before' or 'after'

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in the input.

minLength.description: Minimum number of characters allowed in the input.

name.description: The value of the input's HTML name attribute.

readOnly.description: Prevent changes to the value of the text input.

spellcheck.description: Should the browser support spellcheck for this field (undefined means leaving it up to the browser).

type.description: The value of the HTML type attribute: 'text', 'password', 'email', 'url' or 'number'.

validate.description: A regular expression that must match the value for it to be considered valid. See Regular Expressions

inputFormat.description: Date format string to use for the textual input field

displayFormat.description: Date format string to use for the clickable label

longDisplayFormat.description: If a custom displayFormat is not specified, use unabbreviated day of the week and month names in the default language-specific displayFormat

placeholderLabel.description: Placeholder text shown when the widget is not

placeholderDateFormat.description: User-visible date format string displayed in the textual input field when it's empty

mustBeAfter.description: Validates the date to be after this

mustBeBefore.description: Validates the date to be before this

relative.description: If a namespace is set, display titles relative to it

showDisambigsLast.description: Show disambiguation pages as the last results

showInterwikis.description: Show pages with a valid interwiki prefix

addQueryInput.description: Add exact user's input query to results

excludeCurrentPage.description: Exclude the current page from suggestions

creatable.description: Exclude pages whose namespace is negative

validateTitle.description: Whether the input must be a valid title

required.description: Whether the input must not be empty

highlightSearchQuery.description: Highlight the partial query the user used for this title

flags.description: The name or names of the flags (e.g., 'progressive' or 'primary') to apply.

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

inputFilter.description: The name of an input filter function. Input filters modify the value of an input before it is accepted

inputId.description: The value of the input's HTML id attribute.

name.description: The value of the input's HTML name attribute.

autocomplete.description: Should the browser support autocomplete for this field?

autofocus.description: Use an HTML autofocus attribute to instruct the browser to focus this widget.

buttonStep.description: Delta when using the buttons or Up/Down arrow keys

flags.description: The name or names of the flags (e.g., 'progressive' or 'primary') to apply.

icon.description: The symbolic name of the icon (e.g., 'remove' or 'menu'), or a map of symbolic names.

labelPosition.description: The position of the inline label relative to that of the value or placeholder text: 'before' or 'after'

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in the input.

minLength.description: Minimum number of characters allowed in the input.

name.description: The value of the input's HTML name attribute.

pageStep.description: Delta when using the Page-up/Page-down keys. Defaults to 10 times buttonStep

readOnly.description: Prevent changes to the value of the text input.

showButtons.description: Whether to show the plus and minus buttons.

spellcheck.description: Should the browser support spellcheck for this field (undefined means leaving it up to the browser).

step.description: If specified, the field only accepts values that are multiples of this.

type.description: The value of the HTML type attribute: 'text', 'password', 'email', 'url' or 'number'.

validate.description: A regular expression that must match the value for it to be considered valid

allowArbitrary.description: Allow data items to be added even if not present in the menu.

allowDisplayInvalidTags.description: Allow the display of invalid tags.

allowDuplicates.description: Allow duplicate items to be added

allowEditTags.description: Allow editing of the tags by clicking them

allowedValues.description: An array representing the allowed items by their datas

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

flags.description: The name or names of the flags (e.g., 'progressive' or 'primary') to apply.

icon.description: The symbolic name of the icon (e.g., 'remove' or 'menu'), or a map of symbolic names.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

indicator.description: Symbolic name of the indicator (e.g. 'required' or 'down').

inputPosition.description: Position of the input. Options are: - inline: The input is invisible, but exists inside the tag list, so the user types into the tag groups to add tags. - outline: The input is underneath the tag area. - none: No input supplied

tagLimit.description: An optional limit on the number of selected options

ipAllowed.description: Show IP addresses in autocomplete menu

limit.description: Maximum number of results to load

clearInputOnChoose.description: Clear the text input value when a menu option is chosen

autosize.description: Automatically resize the text input to fit its content

maxRows.description: Maximum number of rows to display when autosize is set to true

rows.description: Number of visible lines in textarea. If used with autosize, specifies minimum number of rows to display.

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

indeterminate.description: Whether the checkbox is in the indeterminate state

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

inputFilter.description: The name of an input filter function. Input filters modify the value of an input before it is accepted

inputId.description: The value of the input's HTML id attribute.

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

id.description: The HTML id attribute used in the rendered tag.

inputFilter.description: The name of an input filter function. Input filters modify the value of an input before it is accepted

inputId.description: The value of the input's HTML id attribute.

name.description: The value of the input's HTML name attribute.

clearable.description: Whether to provide for blanking the value.

allowDropdown.description: Whether or not to allow the dropdown

autoInsertDialCode.description: When enabled (requires nationalMode to be disabled), the international dial code will be automatically inserted into the input

autoPlaceholder.description: Set the input's placeholder to an example number for the selected country, and update it if the country changes

customContainer.description: Additional classes to add to the parent div.

customPlaceholder.description: Change the placeholder generated by autoPlaceholder. Must return a string

excludeCountries.description: In the dropdown, display all countries except the ones you specify here.

formatOnDisplay.description: Format the input value (according to the nationalMode option) during initialisation, and on setNumber. Requires the utilsScript option

geoIpLookup.description: When setting initialCountry to 'auto', you must use this option to specify a custom function that looks up the user's location, and then calls the success callback with the relevant country code

hiddenInput.description: Add a hidden input with the given name.

initialCountry.description: Set the initial country selection by specifying its country code

nationalMode.description: Format numbers in the national format, rather than the international format.

onlyCountries.description: In the dropdown, display only the countries you specify

placeholderNumberType.description: Specify one of the keys from the global enum intlTelInputUtils.numberType

preferredCountries.description: Specify the countries to appear at the top of the list

separateDialCode.description: Display the country dial code next to the selected flag

showFlags.description: Set this to false to hide the flags e.g. for political reasons

utilsScript.description: Enable formatting/validation etc. by specifying the URL of the included utils.js script (or alternatively just point it to the file on cdnjs.com)

classes.description: The names of the CSS classes to apply to the element.

droppable.description: Whether to accept files by drag and drop

icon.description: The symbolic name of the icon

inputFilter.description: The name of an input filter function

inputId.description: The value of the input's HTML id attribute

invisibleLabel.description: Whether the label should be visually hidden

name.description: The value of the input's HTML name attribute

notsupported.description: Text to display when file support is missing

showDropTarget.description: Whether to show a drop target
